I

inquireAvailableCredit() - Method in class models.CreditCardAccount
Displays the available credit by subtracting charges from the credit limit.
inquireBalance() - Method in class models.BankAccount
Displays the current balance of the account.
inquireInvestmentValue() - Method in class models.InvestmentAccount
Calculates and displays the current investment value, including interest.
InvestmentAccount - Class in models
 
InvestmentAccount() - Constructor for class models.InvestmentAccount
Default constructor initializes minimum balance and interest to 0.
InvestmentAccount(int, String, double, double) - Constructor for class models.InvestmentAccount
Constructor to initialize an investment account with specific values.
